image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Dendrites are the unseen architects of your thoughts.
Context visual: These delicate branches extend from neurons, ready to catch incoming signals.
Escalation visual: Imagine each dendrite as a tiny antenna, tuning into the chatter of the brain.
Evidence visual: Research shows they help shape our memories and responses.
Payoff visual: So, when you learn something new, remember: your dendrites are working overtime!
Cta visual: Want to dive deeper into the brain's mysteries? Hit that follow button!
